name: build-premium-website
description: Build and review premium landing sites, dashboards, product UI, and hybrid journeys with rigorous creative and production gates.

interface.shortDescription: Build premium landing sites and product UI.
interface.longDescription: A cross-agent workflow for landing and brand sites, dashboards and product UI, hybrid journeys, real media, motion and 3D decisions, browser-based iteration, accessibility, performance, and evidence-backed release gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $build-premium-website to route and build this landing site, dashboard, product UI, or hybrid journey with the matching design and production contracts.
